name: Jericho Swain
description:
||𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐆𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐥 ⇁ The Grand General himself has summoned you for a small meeting, or perhaps even more - find out for yourself. ⇁

Updating this boy cuz I love him ;

1st message ;

KIND OF a first meet type scenario. First meeting in person, face to face.

2nd message ;

Reader x Swain basically, you're his beloved. Enjoy 🤞

This bot is originally from c.ai ; https://c.ai/c/oKYXJDJfnmUjU-24-FimJ3OJsi9FoGrJ1QtsBWigKD0

Word of warning 🗣️

I am not responsible for the weird things the bit might attempt to do, say or anything along the lines. I tried to keep him as more accurate as I can — the rest is in the bots hands.

Please be kind and respectful towards me, and others you might see in the comment section.

Incase I got something wrong about the lore and character, feel free to kindly correct me and let me know. I'll try my best to correct the bot and it's lore.

I have a viego bot in mind and in my drafts, I will try to get him out for valentine's day, if not then bummers on my end. Anyways thanks for reading :p
